tool_args.label: Contract R34211 - Option 2 Subway Car Purchase (R211A/R211T)
tool_args.raw_text: Modification to the contract to purchase 440 closed-end subway cars and 20 open-gangway subway cars for the 'B' Division, and 75 cars for Staten Island Railway; in order to exercise Option 2 for the purchase of 435 additional subway cars (355 closed-end [R211A] cars and 80 Open Gangway, hard shell [R211T OG1] cars) and related non-car items.

payload.project_name: Contract R34211 - Option 2 Subway Car Purchase (R211A/R211T)
payload.description: Exercise of Option 2 under Contract R34211 to purchase 435 additional subway cars (355 R211A closed-end and 80 R211T OG1 open-gangway) for NYC Transit B Division, plus related non-car items

tool_args.label: Option 2 Request Amount
tool_args.raw_text: This request: $1,266,247,247

payload.description: Estimated amount requested for Option 2 subway car purchase

tool_args.label: Original Contract Amount
tool_args.raw_text: Original Amount: $ 1,444,997,948

payload.description: Original contract amount for R34211 base contract

tool_args.label: Current Contract Amount
tool_args.raw_text: Current Amount: $ 3,253,316,968

payload.description: Current contract amount including prior modifications

tool_args.label: Negotiated Savings from Option 2
tool_args.raw_text: net adjusted price after negotiations and after all credits are applied and adjustments is $1,266,247,247. This represents a $75,440,745 savings from Kawasaki's original proposal of $1,341,687,992.

payload.raw_value_text: $75,440,745 savings from Kawasaki's original proposal of $1,341,687,992
payload.description: Savings achieved through negotiations on Option 2 pricing

tool_args.label: Prior Modifications Amount
tool_args.raw_text: Prior Modifications $ 1,808,319,020

payload.description: Prior modifications to Contract R34211 before this request

tool_args.label: Request as Percentage of Current Amount
tool_args.raw_text: % of This Request to Current Amount: 38.92%

payload.description: This request as a percentage of current contract amount

tool_args.label: Modifications as Percentage of Original Amount
tool_args.raw_text: % of Modifications (including This Request) to Original Amount: 212.77%

payload.description: All modifications including this request as a percentage of original contract amount

tool_args.label: Option 1 Authorized Amount (Nov 2022)
tool_args.raw_text: In November 2022, the Board authorized Option 1 to exercise an additional 640 closed end cars (R211A) as well as related non-car items ... in the amount of $1,782,497,142.00.

payload.description: Amount authorized for Option 1 (640 R211A cars) in November 2022

tool_args.raw_text: In January 2018, the Board authorized the award of Contract R34211 to Kawasaki Rail Car Inc.

payload.description: Board authorized award of Contract R34211 to Kawasaki Rail Car Inc. for 535 subway cars

tool_args.raw_text: Delivery of cars under Option 2 is anticipated to start in 2027 and be completed in 2028.

tool_args.label: Option 2 Cars Will Replace R46 and R68 Subway Cars
tool_args.raw_text: The cars to be purchased under Option 2 will replace R46 and R68 subway cars that run on the B division lines.

payload.claim_text: The cars to be purchased under Option 2 will replace R46 and R68 subway cars that run on the B division lines.
payload.subject: Option 2 cars
payload.description: Purpose of Option 2 cars is replacement of aging R46 and R68 rolling stock on B Division

tool_args.label: Option 2 Cars are CBTC Equipped
tool_args.raw_text: These cars, like the cars in the base contract will be CBTC equipped and will facilitate the continued expansion of CBTC across the B division.

payload.claim_text: These cars, like the cars in the base contract will be CBTC equipped and will facilitate the continued expansion of CBTC across the B division.
payload.subject: Option 2 cars
payload.description: All Option 2 cars are CBTC-equipped to support CBTC expansion on B Division

tool_args.label: Option 2 Cars Configured in Five-Car Operating Units
tool_args.raw_text: Configuring these cars in five-car units results in 435 cars instead of 437.

payload.claim_text: Configuring these cars in five-car units results in 435 cars instead of 437.
payload.subject: Option 2 cars
payload.description: Option 2 cars are configured in five-car operating units reducing count from 437 to 435

tool_args.label: Option Funded with Local Funds
tool_args.raw_text: This option is funded with local funds. This project is funded in the approved 2020 - 2024 Capital Program.
